theme: Tuscany — Farm to table, team to family

linkedin.text:
The best team building doesn't feel like team building.

It feels like this:

30 executives in a 400-year-old Tuscan villa, learning to make fresh pasta from a local nonna. Flour-covered suits. Competitive sauce-making. An olive oil tasting that turned into a 2-hour conversation about life.

No PowerPoints. No facilitators. No awkward name tags.

Just real food, real stories, and the kind of connections that don't happen in a meeting room.

By the end of the day, the CFO and the junior analyst were arguing about the perfect carbonara technique — as equals.

That's what Tuscany does.

Farm to table. Team to family.

📩 alon@upe.co.il

Alon Ouaknine

#Tuscany #CorporateEvents #CulinaryExperience #TeamBuilding #IncentiveTravel #Italy #UproductionEvents #FarmToTable
